---
title: "Resume"
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## 👤 Leykun Getaneh

**Data Scientist | Senior Statistician | Data Analyst**

📍 Addis Ababa, Ethiopia \
📧 [leyk.get@gmail.com](mailto:leyk.get@gmail.com) \
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/leykunget) | [Website](https://leykunget.github.io) | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/leykun-getaneh)

---

## 🧠 Summary

Data Scientist, Statistician, and Data Analyst with 10+ years of experience in academic and public health research. Skilled in R, Python, and statistical modeling with strong expertise in machine learning and emerging deep learning approaches (including transformer-based models such as TFT).

Experienced in building **predictive models, interactive dashboards, and scalable analytics pipelines** using tools like Shiny, Streamlit, and Quarto.

Focused on applying data science to **disease modeling, forecasting, and public health decision support systems**.

---

## 💼 Experience

### **Data Scientist**

**National Data Management and Analytics Center (NDMC), EPHI**
*Jan 2025 – Present*

* Apply machine learning, deep learning, and AI to public health data
* Develop scalable R/Python analytics pipelines and predictive models
* Build dashboards using **Shiny, Streamlit, and Quarto**
* Analytics & Visualization Team Lead for **impactHDSS project**
* Lead data scientist to **Early Warning and Response System (EWARS)**
* Deliver training in R and Python for health professionals
* Contribute to research outputs and policy-relevant analytics

---

### **Lecturer / Researcher / Statistician**

**Wollo University**
*Sep 2016 – Dec 2024*

* Taught statistics and data science courses
* Delivered training in R, Python, SAS, and SPSS
* Supervised undergraduate research projects
* Coordinated departmental research initiatives

---

## 🔬 Projects

### **Malaria Forecasting Dashboard**

* Built interactive forecasting system using Shiny
* Supports woreda → national level decision-making

### **impactHDSS Analytics Platform**

* Led development of analytics pipelines and dashboards
* Multi-site health and demographic surveillance system

### **EWARS (Early Warning System)**

* Designed outbreak detection algorithms
* Integrated multi-source surveillance data

### **Micronutrient Deficiency Prediction**

* ML-based prediction using DHS data
* Published in *Frontiers in Nutrition*

### **COVID-19 Dashboard**

* Nationwide tracking dashboard using Quarto

### **Earthquake Tracker**

* Real-time seismic dashboard using USGS API + Leaflet

---

## 🛠️ Skills

**Programming:**
R (10+ yrs), Python (5+ yrs)

**Data Science:**
Statistical Modeling, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Time Series Forecasting

**Visualization & Apps:**
Shiny (R/Python), Streamlit, Plotly, Leaflet, Quarto

**Frameworks:**
caret, Tidymodels, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch

---

## ⚙️ Tools

RStudio, VS Code, JupyterLab, Git/GitHub
SPSS, Stata, SAS, Power BI
Kobo Toolbox, ODK

---

## 🎓 Education

**MSc in Statistics**
Addis Ababa University

* Thesis: Petroleum oil price forecasting using GARCH

**BSc in Statistics**
University of Gondar

---

## 📄 Publications

**Predictors of Micronutrient Deficiency in Children (2024)**
*Frontiers in Nutrition*
DOI: [https://doi.org/10.3389/fnut.2023.1277048](https://doi.org/10.3389/fnut.2023.1277048)

---

## 🎓 Certifications & Training

* Machine Learning Specialization – DeepLearning.AI / Stanford (2024)
* Certified Instructor – The Carpentries (2024)
* Data Science Specialization – Johns Hopkins University
* Multiple R & Data Science Trainings (EPHI, NDMC, HDSS)

---

## 🌍 Languages

* English (Proficient)
* Amharic (Native)

---

## 🔎 Research Interests

* Machine Learning & Deep Learning
* Disease Modeling & Forecasting
* Time Series Analysis
